docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, VERONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARZA EXPRESS $242.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $257.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $242.00 FILED BY CRUZ, VERONICA AS TO DEFENDANT GARZA EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
INVALID SERVICE, NO COUNTER CLAIM FILED TO HAVE PLAINTIFF SERVED.
JUDGMENT STAYED FOR 2 MONTHS, PLFT TO COOPERATE W/ DEF IN PROCESSING CLAIMS AGAINST WELLS FARGO BK IF REACHED JUDGMT WILL BE DEEMED SATISFIED.
